Document:
# All materials
This is a list of -all- available materials.
## Natural and animal products Water is a valuable resource in Nuclear 14. You will often find dirty or irradiated water in the Wasteland, which needs to be cleaned and disinfected to get clean drinking water.
Radscorpion tails can be harvested from radscorpions with a knife and used to produce antidote.
Brahmin hide, hides, and chitin are harvested from the respective animals.
For all other drinks and drink-related products, see the "Bartending" page.
## Ores, metals, and derivatives Mine lead ore and process it in a forge to get lead ingots.
Break down items to get some survival resources from them.
Mine sulfur ore and process it in a forge to get sulfur powder.
Gather fertilizer from rocks and grind it to get fertilizer as a reagent.
If you need compost immediately, you can also slurry dung with water to make rotten compost for soil and farming recipes.
Combine fertilizer, sulfur powder, and carbon (from coal) to make gunpowder.
## Wood and wood products Wooden planks can be made from wooden logs harvested from trees. Then they can be used to make paper, and paper to make cardboard.
## Other materials Plastic can be obtained by melting down pre-war plastic scrap with a welding tool, by a chemical reaction, or with a recycler if you can find one.
## Pre-war products Mr. Handy fuel can be found while exploring the Wasteland, and it is a handy fuel source for welding tools and generators.
